React Hooks must be called in the exact same order in every component render                                                                                                                                                             react-hooks/rules-of-hooks
  11:8   warning  React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'refresh'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. If 'refresh' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback                                                            react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  15:6   warning  React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'items.length'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. If 'setCount' needs the current value of 'items.length', you can also switch to useReducer instead of useState and read 'items.length' in the reducer                   react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
